title: Natural Incense Sticks Multipack Variants - 5 (90 gms) Charcoal Free Incense Stick, Made from Upcycled Flowers | Sacred Insensé Sticks from all Cultures (Scented Sticks)
features: 5 SACRED NATURAL SCENTS FROM ALL CULTURES - Spiritual Journey incense sticks multipack consists of frankincense incense, dragons blood incense, white sage incense, indian temple incense and holy palo santo incense sticks. Awaken your soul and guide your personal pilgrimage. FIve Amazing Scents for relaxation of the Spirit.
BURN CLEAN CHARCOAL-FREE INCENSE : Charcoal produces toxic gases like sulphur oxides, xylene when burnt. This pack consists of 60 sticks uses flower powder instead of charcoal.

MADE FROM SACRED FLOWERS : Over 800 mil tonne of flower is offered to Gods in India every year, which is then directly disposed in rivers. We UPCYCLE these holy flowers to use in our insencent sticks.
WHY USE TOXIC CHEMICAL INCENSE? : Calmveda natural insense sticks uses only IFRA compliant fragrances to create a truly beneficial and relaxing experience for you.
LOOKING FOR THOUGHTFUL GIFT ? : Each of us wants love, care & comfort for our loved ones. These handmade natural incense sticks are perfect way to convey these feelings.
description: Product Description World's cleanest incense for conscious 'ME' time Experience the sacred with our Spiritual Incense Sticks Variety Pack. Embrace the mystical aroma of palo santo, dragon's blood, frankincense, indian temple, and white sage incense. Previous page Next page 5 variety of incenses to soothe your mind Why we love this incense? 100% Charcoal Free Incense Charcoal is know to produce toxic gases like sulphur dioxide, xylene when burnt. Hence we replaced it completely. Upcycled flowers Flowers offered in religious places are collected, cleaned, dried and powdered to make these Incense. Handmade Incense We directly support 15 rural women who are currently involved in making these incense. Clean & Calming Burning clean good incense can help you with stress and anxiety relief.
